Package global.thalion.ttio

Class MassSpectrum

java.lang.Object
global.thalion.ttio.Spectrum
global.thalion.ttio.MassSpectrum
public class MassSpectrum extends Spectrum
A mass spectrum: m/z + intensity arrays plus MS level, polarity, scan window, and optional precursor activation / isolation metadata.

API status: Stable.

Cross-language equivalents: Objective-C TTIOMassSpectrum, Python ttio.mass_spectrum.MassSpectrum.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    MassSpectrum(double[] mzValues, double[] intensityValues, int indexPosition, double scanTimeSeconds, double precursorMz, int precursorCharge, int msLevel, Enums.Polarity polarity, ValueRange scanWindow)
    Backward-compatible constructor (pre-M74): defaults activationMethod to Enums.ActivationMethod.NONE and isolationWindow to null.
    MassSpectrum(double[] mzValues, double[] intensityValues, int indexPosition, double scanTimeSeconds, double precursorMz, int precursorCharge, int msLevel, Enums.Polarity polarity, ValueRange scanWindow, Enums.ActivationMethod activationMethod, IsolationWindow isolationWindow)
    Full constructor including M74 activation and isolation fields.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Enums.ActivationMethod
    activationMethod()
    MS2+ activation method; Enums.ActivationMethod.NONE for MS1 or when the activation method was not reported by the source.
    SignalArray
    intensityArray()
    Returns the "intensity" SignalArray.
    double[]
    intensityValues()
    Convenience accessor: raw intensity values as a double[].
    IsolationWindow
    isolationWindow()
    MS2+ precursor isolation window, or null for MS1 or when no isolation window was reported.
    int
    msLevel()
    MS level (1, 2, 3, ...).
    SignalArray
    mzArray()
    Returns the "mz" SignalArray.
    double[]
    mzValues()
    Convenience accessor: raw m/z values as a double[].
    Enums.Polarity
    polarity()
    Ion polarity.
    ValueRange
    scanWindow()
    m/z range covered by the scan, or null if not reported.

  • Constructor Details

    • MassSpectrum

      public MassSpectrum(double[] mzValues, double[] intensityValues, int indexPosition, double scanTimeSeconds, double precursorMz, int precursorCharge, int msLevel, Enums.Polarity polarity, ValueRange scanWindow, Enums.ActivationMethod activationMethod, IsolationWindow isolationWindow)
      Full constructor including M74 activation and isolation fields.
      Parameters:
      mzValues - raw m/z values (wrapped into a SignalArray)
      intensityValues - raw intensity values (wrapped into a SignalArray)
      indexPosition - position in the parent AcquisitionRun (0-based)
      scanTimeSeconds - scan time in seconds from run start
      precursorMz - precursor m/z for tandem MS; 0 if not tandem
      precursorCharge - precursor charge state; 0 if unknown
      msLevel - MS level (1, 2, 3, ...)
      polarity - ion polarity
      scanWindow - m/z range covered by the scan; null if not reported
      activationMethod - MS2+ activation method; Enums.ActivationMethod.NONE for MS1
      isolationWindow - MS2+ isolation window; null for MS1 or when not reported

    • MassSpectrum

      public MassSpectrum(double[] mzValues, double[] intensityValues, int indexPosition, double scanTimeSeconds, double precursorMz, int precursorCharge, int msLevel, Enums.Polarity polarity, ValueRange scanWindow)
      Backward-compatible constructor (pre-M74): defaults activationMethod to Enums.ActivationMethod.NONE and isolationWindow to null.

  • Method Details

    • mzArray

      public SignalArray mzArray()
      Returns the "mz" SignalArray.

    • intensityArray

      public SignalArray intensityArray()
      Returns the "intensity" SignalArray.

    • mzValues

      public double[] mzValues()
      Convenience accessor: raw m/z values as a double[].

    • intensityValues

      public double[] intensityValues()
      Convenience accessor: raw intensity values as a double[].

      public int msLevel()
      MS level (1, 2, 3, ...).

      public Enums.Polarity polarity()
      Ion polarity.

    • scanWindow

      public ValueRange scanWindow()
      m/z range covered by the scan, or null if not reported.

    • activationMethod

      public Enums.ActivationMethod activationMethod()
      MS2+ activation method; Enums.ActivationMethod.NONE for MS1 or when the activation method was not reported by the source.

    • isolationWindow

      public IsolationWindow isolationWindow()
      MS2+ precursor isolation window, or null for MS1 or when no isolation window was reported.
